ddls:
CREATE TABLE "search_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search result */,
  "page_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page type (e.g., Google Search Result) */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine (e.g., Google) */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query that triggered the result */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the result was obtained */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the search result */,
  "result_url" TEXT /* Landing URL of the result */,
  "landing_min_time" INTEGER /* Minimum time spent on the landing page */,
  "landing_click" TEXT /* Landing click-through rate */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the result (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used to access the result (e.g., Windows, macOS) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type used to access the result (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_page_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_type_id") REFERENCES page_types ("page_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_results_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the query */,
  "query_category" TEXT /* Category of the query (e.g., product, service) */,
  "query_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the query (e.g., electronics, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landing_pages" (
  "landing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landing page */,
  "result_url" TEXT /* URL of the landing page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the landing page */,
  "landing_page_type" TEXT /* Type of landing page (e.g., product page, homepage) */,
  "client_website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landing_pages_client_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_website_id") REFERENCES client_websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the search engine (e.g., Google) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the search engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_types" (
  "page_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page type */,
  "page_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the page type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the page type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., marketing, sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the search result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the search result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session */,
  "referring_url" TEXT /* Referring URL of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES search_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the client website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the client website */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client (e.g., e-commerce, finance) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used by the device (e.g., Windows, macOS) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Browser type used by the device (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geo_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated (e.g., Asia, Europe) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geo_locations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "click_through_rate" TEXT /* Click-through rate of the query */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate of the query */,
  "cost_per_click" TEXT /* Cost per click of the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_performance_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)
